summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification for 10 open candidate PRs. No shared canonical was selected because the job is an inventory shard. No security-sensitive refs were detected, no merge/fix actions are allowed, and low-signal/instant close are disabled, so all candidates are kept for maintainer review or follow-up rather than closed.
